title: Jurassic World Rebirth
description: Time to join the past with the present, enjoy a world filled with these dinosaurs!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH/MP_JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH_Header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH/MP_JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH_Promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH/MP_JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH_Overview.webp)
---
**Jurassic World Rebirth** is a dinosaur and technology themed modpack, integrating the past with the present. Designed for players who want to bring back a prehistoric world, this modpack is stuffed full of technology, decoration and more! This modpack focuses on a wide array of themes, with the ever present technology, bountiful decoration blocks and tools and most import the prehistoric beasts from 65 million blocks ago. So what are you waiting for? Jump into your new adventure today!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/jurassic-world-rebirth)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/jurassic-world-rebirth)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/i82KzMG8WGQ?si=b2kByavFcYNUm8dg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH/MP_JURASSIC_WORLD_REBIRTH_Features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **It's A Foodies Dream** - So much food, nothing says you have to eat the same meal twice.
- [✔️] **80+ New Biomes** - New Biomes in the Overworld, The Nether, The End and other Dimensions!
- [✔️] **From Fossils To Dinosaurs** - It's time to bring back our prehistoric pals; fossils, dna, machines and more await you in your revival process.
- [✔️] **Modern Tech** - Don't just pal around in the past, use modern machinery to make your life easier, why go mining when you can setup your own quarry.
- [✔️] **Decoration Goodness** - Time to pack your tools, with over 500+ unqiue decoration blocks and a variety of tools, enjoy decorating your enclosures until your heart is content.
## [Modpack Discord](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
